description: Graphic built from a screenshot of a local news article (The Batavian). At top is the black sans-serif headline 'Graduates of inaugural welding pre-apprentice program ready for workforce', followed by an italic byline 'By Howard B. Owens' and the date 'Aug 15, 2025, 7:56am'. Below, framed by a thin gray border, is a color group photograph taken in a room with green lockers, cinder-block walls, and an American flag at upper left. A row of about nine people face the camera. Several are young men in casual or work clothes holding red and white certificates; beside them are adults including a woman in a navy dress and several men (one in a light blue polo, one in a black polo, one in a gray shirt with tattoos). No government seal is on the image. OCR includes detector noise.
notable_text: Graduates of inaugural welding pre-apprentice program ready for workforce; By Howard B. Owens, Aug 15, 2025
